description:
Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, determine the interaction traffic-light colors for the cancer drug 'Lorlatinib' when taken with 'Clarithromycin' and 'Erythromycin'. Create a report at /sdcard/lorlatinib_macrolide_report.txt including the color for each drug and a comparison statement indicating if the interaction severity is the same or different (and which is safer if different).

Format:
Clarithromycin: [Color]
Erythromycin: [Color]
Comparison: [Statement]
